name: comfyui_i2v_short_drama.workflow.json
message: This is not a runnable ComfyUI workflow. Replace this file with a real ComfyUI API-format I2V workflow exported from your local ComfyUI after the workflow has been tested successfully.
export_steps: Open ComfyUI and build a tested image-to-video workflow.
Rename key nodes to the required titles above.
Overwrite examples/workflows/comfyui_i2v_short_drama.workflow.json with the exported API-format JSON.
